abstract: A publisher that exposes its elements as an asynchronous sequence.

declaration.code:
struct AsyncPublisher

where P : Publisher, P.Failure == Never

overview:
## Overview

`AsyncPublisher` conforms to [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/AsyncSequence], which allows callers to receive values with the `for`-`await`-`in` syntax, rather than attaching a [doc://com.apple.Combine/documentation/Combine/Subscriber].

Use the [doc://com.apple.Combine/documentation/Combine/Publisher/values-1dm9r] property of the [doc://com.apple.Combine/documentation/Combine/Publisher] protocol to wrap an existing publisher with an instance of this type.
rawMarkdown:
--- source: https://developer.apple.com/documentation/Combine/AsyncPublisher crawled: 2025-12-12T19:05:01Z --- # AsyncPublisher **Structure** A publisher that exposes its elements as an asynchronous sequence. ## Declaration ```swift struct AsyncPublisher

where P : Publisher, P.Failure == Never ``` ## Overview `AsyncPublisher` conforms to [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/AsyncSequence], which allows callers to receive values with the `for`-`await`-`in` syntax, rather than attaching a [doc://com.apple.Combine/documentation/Combine/Subscriber]. Use the [doc://com.apple.Combine/documentation/Combine/Publisher/values-1dm9r] property of the [doc://com.apple.Combine/documentation/Combine/Publisher] protocol to wrap an existing publisher with an instance of this type. ## Creating an asynchronous publisher - **init(_:)**: Creates a publisher that exposes elements received from an upstream publisher as an asynchronous sequence. ## Creating an iterator - **makeAsyncIterator()**: Creates the asynchronous iterator that produces elements of this asynchronous sequence. - **AsyncPublisher.Iterator**: The iterator that produces elements of the asynchronous publisher sequence. ## Supporting types - **AsyncPublisher.Element**: The type of element produced by this asynchronous sequence. ## Asynchronous Publishers - **AsyncThrowingPublisher**: A publisher that exposes its elements as a throwing asynchronous sequence. ## Conforms To - AsyncSequence
